name: Parabola Center for Law and Policy
title: Parabola Center for Law and Policy
description: Parabola Center for Law and Policy is a nonpartisan think tank of legal professionals coming together to provide everyone with the access and tools to shape the rules of emerging industries — from cannabis to artificial intelligence. Our goal is to design legal frameworks that center consumers, workers, and small businesses, and ensure that the benefits of these new markets go back to the communities most affected by them. Instead of letting powerful corporations hijack each industry as it emerges, we work to keep the power with the people.
